title: slight inconevnience
body:
## **This is a joke mod to torture my friend.**
this mod might have some bugs pls tell me so I can fix.
here is list of features:

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

- No Milk
- Phantom sizes are randomized increasing their power based on size
- Many new debuffs(Wet, Burning Up, Weird Gravity, Bleeding, Honyed, Allergies, Tired, Slimed, and Golden Drawback)
- when having a armor level of above 7 you will sink in water
- added coffee (removes Tired debuff)
- When catching fire in the nether you will remain on fire indefinitely.
- you will get the burning up debuff in the nether
- you will get the weird gravity when in the end
- when up passed midnight you will get the tired dubuff
- water will instantly freeze in the end
- food rots
- most animals will run away in fear if their fellow animal friend is hurt
- getting hit with a sharp weapon will occasionally give you the bleeding debuff
- eating glowberrys will give you glowing
- eating rotten flesh will give you poison
- eating golden apples, enchanted golden apples, or golden carrots will give you golden drawback
- eating any fish has a chance to prick you with fish bone
- braking a bee hive will give you honeyed
- braking glass has a chance to give you bleeding
- when you are in cherry grove you get the allergies debuff.
- when hitting a magma cube, blaze, or strider you get the burning up debuff
- when hitting a shulker or enderman you get the weird gravity debuff
- when hitting a phantom you get the tired debuff
- when levitation runs out you will be smashed into the ground
- when entering water with a lava bucket the bucket will turn into a obsidian bucket
- when entering lava with a water bucket the bucket will turn into a obsidian bucket
- when entering lava with a empty bucket the bucket will turn into a lava bucket
- when entering water with a empty bucket the bucket will turn into a water bucket
- when on fire with a powdered snow bucket the bucket will turn into water bucket
- when on fire with tnt the tnt will explode
- when on fire with gunpowder the gunpowder will explode
- when on fire with tnt minecart the tnt minecraft will explode
- when on fire with a firework star the firework star will explode
- when on fire with a firework rocket the firework rocket will explode
- when you have (blaze rod, lava bucket, magma cream, blaze powder, firecharge, magma block, or torch flower) you will get the burning up debuff
- when you have a wither rose or wither skull you will get the wither debuff
- when you have (snow block, ice, packed ice, blue ice, powdered snow, or powdered snow bucket,) you will start to freeze
- when you have (eye of ender, ender pearl, end crystal, dragon's breath, shulker shell, dragon egg, or dragon head) you will get the weird gravity debuff
- when you have (honeycomb, honey block, honeycomb block, or bee hive) you will get the honeyed debuff
- when you have (glow ink sack, glowstone dust, or glowstone) you will get the glowing debuff
- when you have (heart of the sea, prismarine shards, prismarine crystals, or nautilus shell) you will get the wet debuff
- when you have slime or slime block you will get the slimed debuff
- when you have any flower you will get the allergies debuff
- skeletons, wither skeletons, strays, and piglins will all have the ability to switch to a melee weapon when you are to close and to a ranged weapon if you get to far
- strays will inflict slowness when hitting with melee weapon
- llama spit inflicts wet
- spiders shoot cobwebs that disappear shortly
- Phantoms can go invisible when far from player
- Phantoms despawn during day
- Wandering traders fight back (contrary to popular belief they don't ignore immunity frames just the sound.)
- Polar bears always spawn with a cub
- endermites teleport the player when hitting the player
- slimes have a chance to absorb the player when hitting the player
- ghasts cry(tears hurt)
- ghasts have more hp
- guardians shoot homing bubbles
- Witches throw regeneration potions at other hostile mobs
- Iron golems call for back up when hit
- endermen teleport players out of hiding
- Both the Ravanger and Evoker got Boss level reworks :O
- added obsidian buckets

</details>
